summary: Frontend login flow E2E test (Italian UI). All 4 requested scenarios PASS: admin login redirects to /admin, client login redirects to /app, wrong password shows error 'Email o password non corretti' with data-testid=login-error and no redirect, and re-login after logout works correctly (the originally reported bug).
critical_code_review_comments: Console shows 401 errors on initial load of /login (likely /api/auth/me probe before login) - benign but could be silenced by not calling protected endpoints when no session cookie exists.
test_credentials: Admin: aimagosrl@gmail.com / Aimago123@! ; Client: avesta@gmail.com / Avesta123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login bug reported by user ('credenziali errate' on re-login) is NOT reproducible. Admin login, client login, wrong-password error, and admin logout+re-login all work correctly. Frontend URL: https://prep-center-hub.preview.emergentagent.com/login.
rca of the issue: Original user complaint of 'credenziali errate' on re-login could not be reproduced. Likely root cause was the previously reset password for client 'avesta' (backend fix already applied by main agent) and/or user typing password incorrectly. Current bcrypt verification via /api/auth/login works consistently, cookie httpOnly session and axios withCredentials flow behave properly across logout+re-login cycles.
